front: Musical: A shy Montmartre waitress carries out elaborate schemes to make others happy; adapted from a 2001 French film
Musical: A man with bone disease (the Glass Man) repeatedly copies Renoir's Luncheon of the Boating Party in this 'non-Sondheim' musical
Musical: The title character finds a mysterious box on the night of Princess Diana's death
Musical: 'Times are Hard for Dreamers' — a waitress describes nearby happenings to a blind beggar and sings 'this is how my world gets made'
Musical: Phillipa Soo (of Hamilton fame) originated the title role of this 2017 Broadway musical adapted from a French film
Musical: The title character's mother dies when a Canadian tourist jumps off a cathedral and lands on her
Musical: Nino collects discarded photo booth photographs; the title character returns a box of them to him
